description: Legal document. Location: Cairo. Dated: 20 Adar I 5559 AM, which is 1799 CE. Eliyyahu Ṣevi Ḥbak(?) (צבי חבאך) acknowledges an investment of 2000 medins from Me'ir b. Naʿim, who in turn accepts a gold necklace (מזנק דהב) as collateral.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
